question:
Will Netherlands win on 2025-11-17?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 17, 2025
If Netherlands wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: fifa.com

evidences.title: 5 Tactical Battles That Could Decide Morocco vs Netherlands
evidences.content: Their objective will be to create overloads in midfield, push wide players high and keep Morocco pinned inside their own half. Their defensive transition will also be crucial. If the Netherlands lose the ball with too many players ahead of it, Morocco can attack directly. # MFT Tactical Prediction This match will probably be decided by control versus timing. The Netherlands will try to control territory, possession and rhythm. Morocco will try to control space, transitions and emotional momentum. If the Dutch score early, Morocco may be forced to open up, which would make the match more difficult. But if Morocco keep the score level for long periods, pressure could gradually shift toward the Netherlands. [...] Morocco have created repeated pressure from wide deliveries during the tournament, especially when they can attack the box with several runners. Their ability to win second balls and keep attacks alive could trouble the Dutch defence. The Netherlands, however, are physically strong and well organised in aerial duels. Morocco must therefore be precise with delivery and aggressive with positioning. Defensively, Morocco cannot afford unnecessary fouls near the box. Giving the...

evidences.title: Netherlands World Cup history - FIFA
evidences.content: The Netherlands have reached the World Cup final three times, in 1974, 1978 and 2010. They lost 2-1 to West Germany in 1974, 3-1 after extra time to Argentina in 1978, and 1-0 to Spain in 2010.

evidences.title: Netherlands hit eight, Mitrovic stars | FIFA World Cup 26 qualifying
evidences.content: A penalty and a fine strike from Memphis Depay had the hosts cruising before Liverpool defender Van Dijk marked his return to his first club with a stunning low drive. Xavi Simons netted from an acute angle just after the hour mark before Donyell Malen netted a classy double with Noa Lang scoring in between. Micky Van De Ven made it eight in stoppage time. Netherlands followed up their win in Finland, but it was a night to forget for the Maltese and they sit bottom of the group with a solitary point after four games. Image 4: GRONINGEN - Memphis Depay of the Netherlands celebrates 2-0 during the World Cup qualifier between the Netherlands and Malta at the Euroborg stadium on June 10, 2025 in Groningen, Netherlands. ANP KOEN VAN WEEL (Photo by ANP via Getty Images) [...] ## How qualifying worksHow qualifying works The first round will follow a familiar format, with 12 groups of four or five teams, and the section winners securing World Cup slots. The continent's four remaining berths will then be settled in a 16-team UEFA play-off competition involving the 12 group runners-up and four best-ranked UEFA Nations League section winners. ## Group GGroup G #### Netherlands 8-0 MaltaNet...
